case_title: CURT KURZENHAUSER VS. MARK LAMBROS KURZENHAUSER

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD CONTRACTUAL FILED BY PETITIONER KURZENHAUSER, CURT AS TO RESPONDENT KURZENHAUSER, MARK LAMBROS AKA MARC KURZENHAUSER, AKA MARK LAMBROS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-20-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER CURT KRUZENHAUSER'S HEARING TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. (PRINCIPAL - $ 404,137.00) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 301/PJB

NOTICE OF HEARING TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD; APPLICATION AND DECLARATION FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER KURZENHAUSER, CURT HEARING SET FOR NOV-20-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
